item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct decision-analysis mode, treated the prompt as metric trend and vendor-switch evaluation, and provided a practical attribution, metric, remediation, pilot, and decision matrix framework. It did not fire triage or recast the situation as repeated local repair pressure."}
